name: Tag-Based Filters
description: Filter graph nodes by tag taxonomy and classification

filters.name: Active Status
filters.description: Show only active work items and in-progress tasks
filters.useCase: Focus on current sprint and active development

filters.name: Completed Work
filters.description: Hide completed and verified work items (default: hidden)

filters.name: Critical Priority (P0/P1)
filters.description: Show high-priority and critical items only

filters.name: Security-Related
filters.query: tag:#security OR tag:#vulnerability OR tag:#authentication OR tag:#encryption

filters.name: Testing & QA
filters.query: tag:#testing OR tag:#test-case OR tag:#qa OR tag:#validation
filters.useCase: Review test coverage and validation procedures

filters.name: Documentation
filters.query: tag:#documentation OR tag:#guide OR tag:#tutorial OR tag:#reference
filters.useCase: Navigate knowledge base and help content

filters.name: Governance & Compliance
filters.query: tag:#governance OR tag:#policy OR tag:#compliance OR tag:#ethics
filters.useCase: Review organizational policies and ethical guidelines

filters.name: Technical Debt
filters.description: Show technical debt and refactoring candidates
filters.useCase: Plan refactoring sprints and debt reduction

filters.name: Integration Points
filters.query: tag:#integration OR tag:#api OR tag:#webhook OR tag:#event
filters.description: Show integration points and API boundaries

applyingFilters: Use tag-based queries to filter by classification
Combine multiple tag filters for granular control
Toggle filters to compare different tag groups
